personal.preferred_title: Senior Oracle / SQL / ETL Data Engineer

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience across Oracle, SQL, PL/SQL, ETL pipelines, data migration, data modeling, performance tuning, and production support. Strong background designing and validating data movement across complex enterprise systems, including Oracle RAC, SQL/PLSQL, Pro*C/OCCI/OCI, reporting pipelines, and warehouse-style data structures. Experienced in regulated environments, technical documentation, stakeholder communication, troubleshooting, and maintaining reliable data processes. Best aligned to ETL, Oracle, SQL, data warehouse, data modeling, validation, and performance-focused delivery roles.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and maintained Python, SQL, and Oracle-backed ETL/reporting pipelines that ingested infrastructure telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints and transformed raw operational feeds into trusted reporting and forecasting datasets.

Designed optimized Oracle schemas for historical retention, seasonal analysis, and capacity forecasting, applying SQL tuning, validation checks, and data-quality controls to improve reliability of executive reporting.

Integrated disparate monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight/TSCO, CA APM, and AppDynamics into unified reporting structures, supporting data validation, reconciliation, and issue investigation across source systems.
Built repeatable data preparation workflows using Python, Pandas, SQL, and scripting to replace manual processes and reduce operational risk in regulated financial-services reporting.
Supported production troubleshooting, root-cause analysis, and pipeline issue resolution across data feeds, reporting outputs, and downstream stakeholder dashboards.
Documented data flows, operating procedures, and reporting logic so technical and business teams could understand data lineage, assumptions, and validation rules.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while maintaining correctness, availability, and sub-second query performance.
Developed C++/OCCI/OCI and SQL-based validation routines to verify migration accuracy across millions of transaction records and support phased cutover activities.
Optimized database access patterns, transaction logic, and Oracle performance behavior to reduce physical hardware footprint by 95% while preserving high-volume operational throughput.
Created test and validation frameworks to compare source-to-target results, investigate mismatches, and support production readiness for a major database modernization effort.

experience.title: SME for CA APM / Senior Consultant
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate performance reporting, replacing manual weekly exports with repeatable data processing and reporting routines.
Worked with Oracle, SQL, WebLogic, WebSphere, and J2EE teams to troubleshoot production bottlenecks and document root-cause findings from enterprise monitoring data.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and management modules that standardized operational visibility and reduced manual effort for support teams.
Produced technical documentation and client-facing knowledge transfer materials used by operations and engineering teams.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer
bullets: Developed and supported high-availability telecom billing interfaces using C, C++, Pro*C, PL/SQL, Oracle, Korn Shell, Perl, and UNIX environments.

Delivered performance enhancements in C/C++/Pro*C/PLSQL billing processes, including reduced memory usage, improved throughput, and major database performance gains through sequence and SQL optimization.
Maintained AMDOCS billing, reporting, and interface components across invoicing, settlement, EDI, and customer management workflows.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration and deployment tasks using Korn Shell scripting, reducing manual operational steps.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Oracle Data Migration and Validation Framework
projects.description: Led and implemented validation routines for high-volume migration from distributed MySQL infrastructure into Oracle RAC, ensuring transactional accuracy and production readiness.

projects.name: Enterprise Telemetry ETL and Reporting Platform
projects.description: Built repeatable ETL/reporting workflows to ingest infrastructure telemetry and produce trusted forecasting, dashboard, and executive reporting datasets.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed modern data platform patterns using AWS S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, PySpark, and Parquet to support scalable analytics and reporting workloads.
